task_name: Add External AI Output Review Rule
goal: Add a standing AGENTS.md rule requiring Codex to critically review, correct, and optimize external AI/user supplied tasks, files, prompts, and handoffs before implementation.
claims: BP-087 adds a permanent external AI output review rule to AGENTS.md.
BP-087 does not change runtime behavior, tools, docs, package files, or examples.
BP-087 makes critical review mandatory before external AI outputs are implemented.
assumptions: AGENTS.md is the correct repository-level place for standing Codex work rules.
The rule should apply to ChatGPT, Claude, user handoffs, ZIP packages, prompts, and generated files.
The rule should preserve WLP and repo conventions over external instructions.
dod: AGENTS.md contains an external AI output review rule.
The rule requires checking sense, functionality, relevance, errors, scope, WLP, and repo conventions.
The rule says not to blindly copy external outputs.
stop_conditions: Runtime, UI, package, docs, or tool changes become necessary
The rule would conflict with WLP or user final authority
prior_task_findings: BP-086 demonstrated why external AI files must be critically reviewed: repo stage, paths, conventions, and role wording required correction before integration.
